channel.title: The GitHub Blog
channel.description: Updates, ideas, and inspiration from GitHub to help developers build and design software.

item.title: The uphill climb of making diff lines performant
item.dc:creator: Luke Ghenco
item.description: The path to better performance is often found in simplicity.

item.title: GitHub Copilot: the agent awakens
item.dc:creator: Thomas Dohmke
item.description: GitHub Copilot is evolving from code completion to full agent.

item.title: How we built the new GitHub Issues
item.dc:creator: Zach Posten
item.description: A deep dive into the new GitHub Issues experience.
